title: lobelia serpyllacea var. odorata
intro: Lobelia serpyllacea var. odorata, also known as Kava or Hawaiian Kava, is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands that belongs to the Lobelia genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its analgesic and anxiolytic properties, which are attributed to the presence of kavalactones. The health benefits of Lobelia serpyllacea var. odorata include relieving anxiety and stress, reducing muscle tension and pain, and promoting relaxation. Lobelia serpyllacea var. odorata can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
